india_trends.title: Updated: Global Markets | Australian shares fall as U.S.–Iran impasse, inflation jitters curb risk appetite
india_trends.summary: ​Australian shares closed at their lowest in nearly four weeks on Tuesday as stalled U.S.-Iran peace talks and caution ahead of domestic inflation data kept investors on edge.

india_trends.title: 'If we invest wisely today...': Vijay Kedia shares growth mantra for India, cites China’s big spending model
india_trends.summary: India is building with fewer resources, lower per capita income, and a much younger population. And if we invest wisely today, the dividends of tomorrow could be historic, Vijay Kedia said in a post.

india_trends.title: Updated: Global Markets | Nikkei closes off record high, JGBs wobble on BOJ's hawkish hold
india_trends.summary: Japan's Nikkei share average slipped from a ​record high, government bonds swung and ​the yen rallied on Tuesday, after the central bank struck a ​hawkish tone as it kept interest rates unchanged.

india_trends.title: PSU stock Bank of Baroda sets board meeting date to declare Q4 results 2026, dividend
india_trends.summary: PSU company Bank of Baroda has announced the date to declare Q4 results 2026. The bank will also consider dividend for the financial year 2025-26.

india_trends.title: Maharatna PSU stock BHEL sets board meeting date to declare final dividend for FY26
india_trends.summary: BHEL share price has rallied over 37% in one month and has gained 20% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis. The PSU stock has surged 47% over the past six months, while it has jumped 52% in one year. BHEL stock price has delivered multibagger returns of 346% in three years.

india_trends.title: Blackstone-backed Bagmane Prime Office REIT files Rs 3,405-cr IPO
india_trends.summary: Bagmane Prime Office REIT, backed by Blackstone, is launching an Initial Public Offering to raise Rs 3,405 crore. india_trends.title: Oil Back Above $110 as World Awaits US Response to Iran Proposal
india_trends.summary: Oil rose to a three-week high above $110 a barrel in London as traders awaited the US response to a proposal from Tehran to end the war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

india_trends.title: German 10-year yield at two-week high as oil prices grind higher
india_trends.summary: Germany's 10-year yield nudged up to a two-week ​high on Tuesday as ​the Strait of Hormuz remained effectively shut and ​oil prices climbed, leaving investors positioning for a longer-lasting period of weak growth and high inflation.
